description: Model tier configuration for code-doc-consistency pipeline. Controls which LLM model is used for each agent role.

economy.description: Fast, cost-effective model for deterministic tasks that only call scripts

standard.description: Balanced model for moderately complex semantic tasks

premium.description: Most capable model for complex reasoning and deep analysis

code-graph-builder.reason: Coordinator that only calls scripts; no LLM reasoning needed

doc-graph-builder.reason: Coordinator that only calls scripts; no LLM reasoning needed

code-batch-analyzer.reason: Requires deep understanding of code semantics, cross-batch calls, and business logic

doc-freetext-analyzer.reason: Free-text entity extraction is moderate complexity; Sonnet is sufficient

graph-reviewer.reason: Schema validation and integrity checks are rule-based, not semantic

consistency-checker.reason: Four-layer diff requires deep semantic alignment, especially Layer 4 behavioral/flow comparison

overrides._comment: Environment variable or CLI overrides. Set CDC_MODEL_TIER=<role>=<tier> to override.

CI_ECONOMY.description: CI cost-saving mode: downgrade all agents to save tokens
